title: Rearrange "view" buttons/tabs on a board?

posts.author: RandyReed (Randy Reed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to rearrange the buttons/tabs along the top of my board?

image1161×375 112 KB

I’m hoping there is an easy answer but have not found it here in the community.

I figured if I am looking at this, it make sense to ask here as I’m guessing someone else might want/need it.

Thank you in advance!!!

Randy

posts.cookedHtml:
